title: More Spring to Life
description: Transform your Minecraft world with brand-new flora, fauna, and mechanics across multiple biomes! This mod breathes fresh life into Birch Forests, Swamps, Badlands, Deserts, and Savannas, introducing new animals, plants, and interactive features.

![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d535f163516cd3e03a4ede9b5721857a0e2a58.png)

# Description

**More Spring to Life** is a mod that transform your Minecraft world with brand-new flora, fauna, and mechanics across multiple biomes! It breathes fresh life into Birch Forests, Swamps, Badlands, Deserts, and Savannas, introducing new animals, plants, and interactive features.



## ✨ Features by Biome:


###       **🌳 Birch Forest:**
- Red & Brown Shelf Mushrooms: Vibrant fungi growing on birch trees, adding more natural beauty.  
- Gardenia: A tall, elegant white flower that enhances the forest’s charm.  
- Raccoon: A mischievous creature that adores glowing berries. Beware, he'll sneakily steal items from nearby chests! If you want them back, offer him his favorite food.  

###       🌊 Swamp & Mangrove Swamp:
- Flowered Lilypad: A delicate water flower that naturally spawns in swampy waters.  
- Algae: Thin aquatic plant layers covering the water’s surface.  
- Crab: A brilliant blue crustacean with a large and small claw. It feeds on tropical fish, and when sheared, it drops its claw, which regrows over time!  
- Crab Claw:  Hold in either hand to build and break blocks from an extended range (+2 blocks).  

###       🏜 Badlands:
- Prickly Pear Cactus: Found in two forms—normal and fruited. Use bone meal to grow it and shears to harvest the delicious Prickly Pear fruit!  
- Tumbleweed: These bushes randomly move across the terrain, blown by the wind.  
- Vulture: A scavenging bird that swoops in to steal any dropped items nearby!  

###     🌵 Desert:
- Coconut Palm Tree: A brand-new desert tree with a unique wood set.  
- Coconuts: Tasty fruits that grow on Coconut Palm Trees.  
- Coconut Rattles: A musical instrument crafted from empty coconut shells and a stick.  
- Meerkat: A friendly creature that eats Prickly Pears. They spawn in deserts and can be tamed!  

###     🌾 Savanna:
- Baobab Trees: Iconic trees with a completely new wood set.  
- Baobab Fruits: A nutritious fruit found on Baobab trees.  
- Termites: Not mobs, but present within *Termite Mounds*, which may be empty or filled.  
- Decomposition Table: Wood-eating termites help transform logs into paper! Simply craft this table and convert any wood into 1-3 pieces of paper.  
- Silt Blocks: A new material found within termite mounds. Includes polished and brick variants.  
- Ostrich: A rideable savanna animal that loves Baobab Fruits. If it stands on sand, it will bury its head underground!     

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

##       🚀 Ready to Explore?  
Download now and discover a world filled with new creatures, plants, and mechanics! Expand your biomes and make Minecraft feel wilder than ever!
